'''nashuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xir|xir]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xir|xir]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nashuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næshichith|næshichith]] || [[word:næshichij|næshichij]] || [[word:næshichish|næshichish]] || [[word:næshichi|næshichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nashushuchuth|nashushuchuth]] || [[word:nashushuchuj|nashushuchuj]] || [[word:nashushuchush|nashushuchush]] || [[word:nashushuchu|nashushuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nashuchuth|nashuchuth]] || [[word:nashuchuj|nashuchuj]] || [[word:nashuchush|nashuchush]] || [[word:nashuchu|nashuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nashufchuth|nashufchuth]] || [[word:nashufchuj|nashufchuj]] || [[word:nashufchush|nashufchush]] || [[word:nashufchuf|nashufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nashuchuthu|nashuchuthu]] || [[word:nashuchuju|nashuchuju]] || [[word:nashuchushu|nashuchushu]] || [[word:nashuchuku|nashuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nashuchuth|nashuchuth]] || [[word:nashuchuj|nashuchuj]] || [[word:nashuchush|nashuchush]] || [[word:nashuchu|nashuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nashuchuthul|nashuchuthul]] || [[word:nashuchujul|nashuchujul]] || [[word:nashuchushul|nashuchushul]] || [[word:nashuchukul|nashuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nashuchuthuthu|nashuchuthuthu]] || [[word:nashuchujuju|nashuchujuju]] || [[word:nashuchushushu|nashuchushushu]] || [[word:nashuchuku|nashuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nashuchuthun|nashuchuthun]] || [[word:nashuchujun|nashuchujun]] || [[word:nashuchushun|nashuchushun]] || [[word:nashuchukun|nashuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nashuchuthuoro|nashuchuthuoro]] || [[word:nashuchujuoro|nashuchujuoro]] || [[word:nashuchushuoro|nashuchushuoro]] || [[word:nashuchukuoro|nashuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
